description_long: This cathedral is a grand, elongated structure with a cruciform layout, featuring a prominent central nave flanked by tall, pointed arched windows and flying buttresses. The facade is dominated by two symmetrical towers with spires, a large rose window, and ornate entry portals. The roof is steeply pitched and dark in color, contrasting with the light stone exterior. Along the sides, rows of tall, narrow windows allow ample light into the interior, while the rear of the building features a rounded apse with additional window tracery. Decorative elements such as pinnacles, finials, and detailed stonework are visible throughout, especially on the towers and facade. The overall design is reminiscent of classic Gothic cathedrals found in European cities.
description: A large, ornate Gothic cathedral with twin spired towers, a rose window, and pointed arched windows along its stone facade. The structure features a dark pitched roof and intricate architectural details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the twin spired towers, central rose window, and main entry portal with detailed ornamentation.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cathedral's elongated nave, rows of tall arched windows, and the prominent bell tower on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the rounded apse, radiating chapels, and the symmetry of the spires and roofline.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, with the bell tower now on the right and the full length of the nave visible.
attribute_facade_ornamentation: The main facade features elaborate stone tracery, a large rose window, pointed arches, and sculpted details around the entry portal and towers. Decorative pinnacles and finials accentuate the verticality and grandeur of the structure.
attribute_stained_glass_windows: Tall stained glass windows are present along the nave and in the rose window on the main facade, featuring intricate patterns and vibrant colors.
attribute_entry_portal_design: The main entry portal is a pointed arch adorned with sculpted stonework and flanked by columns, with large wooden doors at its base. Above the portal sits a prominent rose window framed by additional decorative elements.
